purpose: Define and validate proposed Work Item extraction from local Source Record samples; scoped live Dataverse demo evidence is captured separately without approval execution or outbound action.

proposedWorkItems.com_title: Decide whether the manual source needs follow-up
proposedWorkItems.com_summary: Review the manual summary source and decide whether it should become executable Council work.
proposedWorkItems.com_confidence_summary: Extraction confidence 0.78; type confidence 0.84; owner confidence 0.82. Source is local sample evidence, not tenant verified.
proposedWorkItems.com_rationale: The source explicitly says it can be reviewed later for zero, one, or many proposed Work Items. A decision item is proposed because human judgment is required before execution.
proposedWorkItems.com_recommended_next_action: Doug reviews the source rationale and either approves, holds, ignores, or asks for a more specific extraction.
proposedWorkItems.extraction_rationale: The source contains possible work context but not enough authority to execute. It should become a proposed decision only.
proposedWorkItems.uncertainty: The local sample does not include real tenant context or the full source body, so exact owner, urgency, and action should be reviewed.

proposedWorkItems.com_title: Follow up on mock Outlook message reference
proposedWorkItems.com_summary: Review the mock Outlook message reference and decide whether it represents a real follow-up once live reads are authorized.
proposedWorkItems.com_confidence_summary: Extraction confidence 0.72; type confidence 0.76; owner confidence 0.70. The source is explicitly mock/manual evidence.
proposedWorkItems.com_rationale: The Outlook Source Record proves message/conversation reference shape, but live Graph reads are not authorized. The Work Item remains proposed and cannot trigger external action.
proposedWorkItems.com_recommended_next_action: After live-read approval, compare against a verified Outlook message and decide whether to keep, replace, or ignore the proposed follow-up.
proposedWorkItems.extraction_rationale: A follow-up is plausible from the Outlook reference shape, but the record is not tenant verified and has no authorized body content. It must remain proposed.
proposedWorkItems.uncertainty: The mock source lacks real body text, sensitivity labels, and tenant permission context; it may produce zero actionable Work Items after verification.

workItemSourceLinks.com_rationale: The manual summary sample is the sole evidence for the proposed decision.
The mock Outlook message sample is the source reference being tested for proposed follow-up extraction.

sourceUpdatesDeferred.deferredUpdate: com_extraction_status may become extracted only after a receipt-backed mutation story is implemented.
com_extraction_status may remain new or held until live Outlook evidence exists.

acceptanceMapping.tenantEvidenceRequired: Captured for deterministic demo proposed Work Item CWI-DEMO-001; curated Council Queue form/view evidence remains required.

localEvidence: Dataverse row IDs absent from product identity fields
acceptanceMapping.tenantEvidenceRequired: Captured for deterministic demo Work Item Source link for CWI-DEMO-001; curated Council Queue form/view evidence remains required.
